## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between OX Ai and GrowthX Ai for go-to-market strategy and content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [OX Ai seeks help refining GTM strategy, creating content, and driving awareness for their AI-native job training platform](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [GrowthX Ai offers SEO, content creation, and strategic GTM services, with a focus on delivering measurable outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to share more information and reconvene in 1-2 weeks to discuss a tailored proposal](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Topics

### OX Ai's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Recently completed deep incubation and defined product wedge](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Aiming to speed through awareness-building and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Targeting a mix of product-led and sales-led growth](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Connected with \~1,500 potential buyers on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Seeking to educate market on paradigm shift in training/development](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Goals: connect with economic buyers in TAM, educate about paradigm shift, stack calendar with meetings](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### GrowthX Ai's Offerings and Approach

  - [Provides SEO, content creation, and strategic go-to-market services](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Emphasizes measurable outcomes over volume metrics](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Offers 12-week "boot camp" engagement with 1-week prep and 2-week calibration](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Can act as fractional growth team or complement internal hires](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [Utilizes jobs-to-be-done framework for deep customer understanding](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Provides expertise in complex B2B sales strategies (e.g., Gap Selling methodology)](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Refining OX Ai's go-to-market strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Creating targeted content for different stakeholders (e.g., CIO, Digital Transformation Officer, Head of HR)](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Developing SEO strategy and content to drive organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Assisting with social media presence, particularly on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Supporting complex enterprise sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

### Discussion on Timing and Approach

  - [Debated merits of starting SEO now vs. waiting](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Explored possibility of using content to accelerate jobs-to-be-done learnings](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=3021.0)
  - [Considered balance between short-term results and long-term strategy](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Josh to send examples of adjacent companies, economic buyers, and potential early customers to GrowthX Ai](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=2722.0)
  - [GrowthX Ai to create a Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [GrowthX Ai team to digest information and prepare a tailored proposal](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [Reconvene in 1-2 weeks to discuss specific offerings and potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/FNv3VUHmMe-EL2YB6zMLXMmwYSz9_FM3?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
